best_for: Broad coverage options, no-exam for impaired risks
underwriting_speed: Same day to 4 weeks (FlexTerm no-exam available)
perks: FlexTerm policy available with no medical exam for qualifying applicants
Very high coverage amounts available for businesses and high-net-worth
Broad policy options from term to variable universal life
Strong financial strength with A+ AM Best
Accelerated death benefit included at no additional cost
Competitive pricing for term life for most age groups
drawbacks: No-exam option limited to specific health profiles and amounts
Variable life products carry investment risk
Application process can be slower for complex policies
